name: Egg-Free Vegetable Stir-Fry
tagline: Hot-wok stir-fry of broccoli, peppers, snap peas, garlic, soy
highlight: No eggs in the sauce or veg — just the wok and a splash of soy

hero.alt: Stir-fried vegetables glossed in dark sauce
hero.caption: stir-fry — wok-charred

healthFacts: High-heat wok cooking preserves crunch and most heat-sensitive vitamins.
Sesame oil is finishing oil — its flavor breaks down at high heat.

steps.title: Mise en place
steps.detail: Stir-fry waits for nobody. Slice all vegetables, mince garlic and ginger, whisk soy with vinegar and cornstarch slurry — before the wok touches heat.
steps.tip: If you're chopping while it cooks, you've already lost.

steps.title: Sear hard veg
steps.detail: Heat 2 tbsp neutral oil in a wok over high. Add broccoli and carrot; toss 3 min until edges are spotted brown.
steps.tip: Wok should smoke a bit — that's the breath of fire (wok hei).

steps.title: Add tender veg
steps.detail: Add bell pepper and snap peas, toss 90 seconds. Push to the side, add garlic and ginger to the bare spot, sizzle 30 sec.
steps.tip: Aromatics on bare wok keeps them from steaming under the veg.

steps.title: Sauce and finish
steps.detail: Pour in sauce; toss to coat as it thickens, ~30 sec. Off heat, drizzle sesame oil. Plate.
steps.tip: Sauce too thick? Splash water. Too thin? Cook 30 sec more.
